inputs.name: advanced
inputs.description: Allow to show filter in advanced search template

inputs.name: exclude
inputs.description: Allow to use filter for excluding in `define conditions tab`

inputs.name: include
inputs.description: Allow to use filter for including in `define conditions tab`

inputs.name: key
inputs.description: Uniq key for search and filtering

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: Label for header in search table and search field

inputs.name: main
inputs.description:
Allow to control which of filters should show as main in mobile view.
Apply for search table only

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Initial filter's value for search section in `select from list tab` only
